description: Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in Chipmunk Forum script allow remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via the forumID parameter to (1) newtopic.php, (2) quote.php, (3) index.php, and (4) reply.php.
